textByHash.022d39725524df7e3670e96598862c3cb9cf4166: Hello there adventurer, what do you want of me?
textByHash.13ef9d956ffe949a80f9bef701d2a54c40e572ba: Sorry, I cannot help you with that.
textByHash.32fa180bb85a46bd2400be1702e60a821c4da672: You usually leave rooms through doors, but this one is locked.
textByHash.612705198b76f7b04973cc03a2dfd077dc51bbc5: I was glad to get my revenge on those knights in the keep. They were no match for us.
textByHash.6903415ba3100d7704b0a3d71645ec555fb6fd0f: I fear we may never escape this dank dungeon.
textByHash.6a9fed804b25c68dd312d19a08f496d42cda6029: After your help freeing Merlin, my help is the least I can offer as a man of honour.
textByHash.783d45b84f5b5f26b9e6317f06189f72cc257a60: How are you going to get all of us out of here?
textByHash.96b49f905c7f36fa18d756ae96b1079730df0ae4: I do not know of any myself... but it would perhaps be worth your while asking the King if he has any tasks for you.
textByHash.aaa4ff24173cced8ef0462cb00207f37c147194e: I'm sorry, I don't have any pockets.
